title: werauhia orjuelae
intro: Werauhia orjuelae, also known as the Ruffled Prionium, is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Werauhia orjuelae include relief from coughs and colds, as well as reduced inflammation and congestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
